fo.resourcePack.modmenuhelper: §7Lists mods' main features and options in Mod Menu§r
modmenu.dropInfo.line1: <blue>🛠</blue>/<dark_gray>🛠§r - FO mod, available options; <gold>🔀</gold> - FO alternative mod;
modmenu.dropInfo.line2: 📥 - custom resource pack required to see effect
modmenu.summaryTranslation.bettergrass:
OptiFine's Better Grass & Snow (opt-in)
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Mode, supported blocks, exceptions</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.bettermounthu:
Shows food and XP while on a mob
<dark_gray><st>🛠</st><dark_gray> (no options)</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.bigshot:
<gold>🔀</gold> Take double-size screenshots with <keybind key.bigshot.take_screenshot_2x>
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> In Key Binds: other sizes</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.capes:
OptiFine's and other capes
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Providers, preferred provider, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.citresewn: OptiFine's Custom Items 📥🛠 Toggle mod, allow broken packs, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.config_manage:
Modpack's default options
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Apply or reset to default options</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.continuity: OptiFine's Connected & Emissive Textures 📥🛠 Toggle block features
modmenu.summaryTranslation.crash_assista:
Helps you report crashes and fix known ones
<dark_gray>🛠 (only advanced options)</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.cubes-without:
Full screen with Alt+Tab support (opt-in)
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> In Video Settings: toggle mod</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.cull-less-lea:
<gold>🔀</gold> Faster tree leaves
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toggle mod, leaf depth</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.debugify:
Fixes bugs, makes telemetry toggleable
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toggle fixes, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.dynamic_fps:
Reduces FPS in the background
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toggle mod, restore on hover, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.e4mc:
Open worlds to Internet, just like LAN
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Use and configure via "<lang menu.shareToLan>"</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.enhancedblock:
Faster chests, signs, beds etc.
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Blocks to improve, method</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.entityculling:
Stops rendering mobs behind walls
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toggle mod, disable for (block)entities, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.entity_model_: OptiFine's Custom Entity Models 📥🛠 Refresh speed, disable models, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.entity_textur: OptiFine's Random & Emissive Entities 📥🛠 Random mobs, emissivity, eye blinking, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.fabrishot:
Take 4K screenshots with <keybind key.fabrishot.screenshot>
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Override <keybind key.screenshot>, resolution, keybind, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.fastquit:
Quits from singleplayer instantly
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toasts, indicator, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.immediatelyfa:
Optimizes mobs, container blocks, GUI, HUD
<dark_gray>🛠 (only advanced options)</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.iris: OptiFine's Shaders 📥🛠 Toggle mod, select shader, keybinds, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.isxander-main:
Modpack version in title screen
<dark_gray>🛠 (only advanced options)</dark_gray></dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.lambdynlights:
OptiFine's Dynamic Lights
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Quality, entity options, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.languagereloa:
Instant language switching, searchbar
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Multi-language Creative search, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.lithium:
Optimizes physics and chunks
<dark_gray>🛠 (only advanced options)</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.midnightcontr:
<gold>🔀</gold> Controller and touchscreen support
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Input method, keybinds, controller options, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.mixintrace:
Helps developers find the cause of crashes
<dark_gray><st>🛠</st><dark_gray> (no options)</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.modernfix:
Optimizes loading speeds, reduces RAM usage
<dark_gray>🛠 (only advanced options)</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.modmenu:
This mod menu
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Button placement, filtering, sorting, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.moreculling:
Stops rendering hidden sides of blocks
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toggle blocks, item frames, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.nochatreports:
Consistent chat status indicators
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Toggle mod, chat indicators, prompt mode, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.nuit: 🔀 Custom Sky 📥🛠 Expand the mod to configure (click ▼ on icon)
modmenu.summaryTranslation.nuit_interop: 🔀 OptiFine's Custom Sky 📥🛠 Formats, prefer own format, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.paginatedadva:
Big advancement screen and requirement list
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Requirement visibility, tab pinning, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.puzzle: OptiFine's Custom Loading Screen 📥🛠 Toggle mod, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.rrls:
Resource packs load in the background
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Loading fade animation speed, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.sodium:
Optimizes rendering, better FPS
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> In Video Settings: optimizations</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.sodium-extra:
OptiFine's graphics options
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> In Video Settings: animations, particles, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.sspb:
Vanilla look for dirt paths
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> In Video Settings: shadow strength, ...</dark_gray>
modmenu.summaryTranslation.skyboxify: OptiFine's Custom Sky 📥🛠 Formats, sun/moon, stars, ...
modmenu.summaryTranslation.zoomify:
Zoom by holding <keybind zoomify.key.zoom>
<blue>🛠</blue><dark_gray> Distance, cinematic camera, keybind, ...</dark_gray>
fo.resourcePack.fastbettergrass:
§7OptiFine's Better Grass (fast)§r
§4Must be the first to work§r
accessibility.onboarding.screen.title:
Welcome to §7Fabulously Optimized§r! Here are some tips.

§f🪟§r Connected Textures and Dynamic Lights - configure in §7Mods§r
§a🏞§r Better Grass and full screen with Alt+Tab - enable in §7Video Settings§r
§e✨§r Shaders and fancy resource packs - just §7add and enable§r
§5🎮§r Game controllers supported - simply §7connect and use§r
§3🛜§r Play with friends, anywhere - press §7Open to Internet§r in singleplayer
<dark_gray>📸§r Take 4K screenshots - press §7F9§r
§6🏴§r Free custom capes - §7https://download.fo/cape§r
§b🌐§r Help translate the modpack - §7https://download.fo/translate§r
§2➕§r Add extra mods - §7https://download.fo/add§r
§4❓§r Problems or questions - §7https://download.fo/wiki§r

(§7Maximize window§r or visit §7https://download.fo/tutorial§r)
